rationale: The execution of PowerShell to import 'SharpHound.ps1' (A0) followed by the execution of 'SharpHound.exe' (EV-001) with the '--CollectionMethod all' argument indicates active directory reconnaissance. The subsequent creation of a 'BloodHound.zip' file (EV-008) containing various JSON files (EV-002 to EV-007) confirms the collection of sensitive domain information, which is a common precursor to privilege escalation or lateral movement.
